name: memory-arbiter-mcp
description: Local MCP memory server with dual timeline conflict arbitration. Share one memory store across all your AI coding tools.

tools.name: memory_write
tools.description: Write a structured memory entry with source tracking

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: Search memories via FTS5 or LIKE fallback

tools.name: memory_compare
tools.description: Compare two memories for conflicts without recording

tools.name: memory_arbitrate
tools.description: Arbitrate a conflict and optionally record the result

tools.name: memory_confirm
tools.description: Promote a memory to user-confirmed and lock it

tools.name: memory_status
tools.description: Show current mode, degradation status, and storage paths
